title: calophyllum laxiflorum
intro: Calophyllum laxiflorum, also known as the 'Bintangor' or 'Red Sandalwood', is a tree species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the Calophyllaceae family. The medicinal properties of Calophyllum laxiflorum lie in its resinous heartwood, which has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help reduce pain and inflammation, as well as promote wound healing and protect against infections. Calophyllum laxiflorum is often prepared into herbal remedies, such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
